member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.Orchestrator.ActivationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: DI wiring for the activation pipeline — all 15 workers (transient). The BackgroundService orchestrator has been removed in Phase 4; Azure Durable Functions now orchestrate these workers via ActivationOrchestratorFunction. Call from Api/Program.cs; the orchestrator project already references all workers.
